This game has a unique style its made in Lego which makes it so much fun. The shop allows you to buy in game hats to customize your brick player. This game has built in mod menus which brings a whole different play style to the game. This game is definitely a 5 star.

Brick Mania is actually an AMAZINGLY cool game. I've played it all the time. They have mod menus, and good customer support in their tickets, (their discord is discord.gg/brickmania) I've met 5 mods and they're all so cool. I needed help linking my account so I could get my cosmetics from the Brick Tag and I made a ticket and they helped me in less than 3 hours. The new maps are so fun to play in also. My friends and I have so much fun just being a Lego brick running around. I would recommend trying out the game because it is so under rated. I would love to see how far this game comes.

This game is so cool because it’s Gorrila Tag, but Lego. It’s got a mall with all of these cosmetics (made out of Lego). This map to play tag in, it’s big as well (pause). And am such a Lego fan I had to check it out. (GREAT GAME)!
The game won’t load! It gives me the title then just goes black. It’s so annoying and I was so excited to play the game🫡

developer_response.body:
Hey Fkuffhead,

Sorry you are encountering this issue. Its likely to do with your network blocking the requests to our server if you have a custom firewall set up on your network.

Please join the discord to get support so we can help you fix this issue. https://discord.com/invite/brickmania

You can make a ticket to get direct developer support!

Let us know you are from this review too!

I had brick tag and got a mod menu for REAL money and I can’t use it in this game

developer_response.body:
Hey,

You can actually get your mod menu back and any other data.

Go to brick tag > enter a username and password > go to brick mania account linking > enter same username and password.

If you are having trouble join our discord for direct developer support.
https://discord.com/invite/brickmania

Would be great if you could revise your review to as its not accurate. Thanks!
